title: Jetson Master and Dual Arduino Slave Architecture
excerpt: A complete architecture note for the rover control stack: Jetson as coordinator, Command Mega as actuator slave, Sensor Arduino as feedback slave, plus packet and data-flow diagrams.
imageAlt: Jetson master and dual Arduino slave rover architecture diagram

title: From Manual Commands to an Autonomous Rover Stack
excerpt: A practical look at how rover work evolved from direct component testing into mission files, calibration, command tools, and autonomy experiments.

title: Field Testing Notes: Make Hardware Behavior Visible
excerpt: The small habits that make debugging easier: visible sensor state, repeatable commands, good references, and calm tests.
